shadow_event.query:
# Context Refresh Failed

workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core

Command failed: /usr/local/bin/node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size

Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.

transcript.content: 会，但有边界。 按现在这个 standalone 扩展的实现：
codex context meter 删除掉； 新窗口不是这个仓库时，状态栏直接显示 Ctx: no workspace =》要 tooltip 里写清楚当前绑定的是哪个 workspace 路径 =〉要 果你同时开两个窗口：两个窗口各自独立刷新，各看各自 workspace =》需要
已经改了，而且只改独立扩展。 现在的行为是：
点击状态栏 有时候没有反应； 或比较慢；
这两个问题我已经针对性修了： 1. 点击有时没反应 原因是点击后才同步去跑命令，窗口要等结果回来才出现。 现在改成： - 点击后立刻打开小窗口 - 如果有缓存先显示缓存 - 没缓存就先显示 `Loading…` - 后台再异步刷新内容
`Ctx: error` 的意思很直接： `独立扩展在刷新 context 大小时失败了。`
已经补上了。 现在独立扩展会把这几种情况明确分开：

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/Contents/Frameworks/Code Helper (Plugin).app/Contents/MacOS/Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.
根因就是你贴出来的这句： ```text /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/.../Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size ```

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /usr/local/bin/node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.

decision.archive_summary: Earlier UI/status-bar work appears resolved: removed context meter, show `Ctx: no workspace` for non-repo windows with tooltip clarifying the bound workspace path, each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently, and clicking the status bar should open immediately with cached/loading content while refresh runs asynchronously. Error-state semantics were clarified and expanded so `Ctx: error` means refresh failed and distinct cases are surfaced more explicitly.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active topic is still the same context-refresh failure, so this stays `continue`. The latest user turn (t12) reports the current failing command and should retain the immediately relevant prior investigation in raw form, especially t10-t11, because the assistant had already analyzed the same failure pattern with a different executable path. Older feature-change discussion and general `Ctx: error` explanation are solved/background context and can leave the next-turn raw prompt. Durable product requirements and error-label semantics from t2/t7/t9 are worth preserving as compact pins even if their raw turns are evicted.

applied.archiveSummary: Earlier UI/status-bar work appears resolved: removed context meter, show `Ctx: no workspace` for non-repo windows with tooltip clarifying the bound workspace path, each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently, and clicking the status bar should open immediately with cached/loading content while refresh runs asynchronously. Error-state semantics were clarified and expanded so `Ctx: error` means refresh failed and distinct cases are surfaced more explicitly.
